holdings.infoBox: IFRA is an equity ETF with a total of 167 individual holdings. The top holdings are Caterpillar stock at N/A, Quanta Services at N/A, Union Pacific at N/A, NextEra Energy at N/A, and CSX Corporation at N/A.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Infrastructure ETF (IFRA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NYSE FactSet U.S. Infrastructure index. The fund tracks an index of US-listed infrastructure companies that derive a significant portion of their revenue from within the US. IFRA was launched on Apr 3, 2018 and is issued by BlackRock.
